message:
fix(mux): fix memory corruption and double-free in zstd compression

1. zstd.zig: Fix memory corruption when realloc fails
   - Previously returned a smaller slice of a larger allocation
   - When freed, the wrong size would be passed to the allocator
   - Now allocates exact size buffer, copies, and frees original

2. ws_server.zig: Fix protocol issue with compression flag
   - Small binary messages (<64 bytes) were sent without flag byte
   - Now all binary messages include the compression flag when zstd enabled
   - Added sendUncompressedWithFlag helper for cleaner code

3. ws_server.zig & transfer.zig: Prevent double-free
   - Null out optional compressor/decompressor after deinit
   - Prevents issues if deinit is called multiple times
